sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n49566" key="qusiasth/rios" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">θῠσι-αστήριος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">α</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n49566.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">sacrificial</tr_>, [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ὕμνος</foreign>] <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1733.tlg001:154" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Timae.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">154</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
